title: Englerophytum koulamoutouense

The plant is classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Englerophytum koulamoutouense is further classified under the class Magnoliopsida and the order Ebenales. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in its family and order.
